message:
chore(beads): refinement pass 3 — logging standards, J.2 dep fix, E2E bash script

Structural fix:
- Remove wrong J.2 → J.1 dep (J.2 is a per-track-merge gate, not post-J.1)
  J.2 is now a leaf node (ready immediately), as intended

Cross-cutting: Add logging standard to epic (br-d9r61)
- All implementation beads must include tracing instrumentation
- info! on init, debug! on state changes, trace! on hot paths, warn! on fallbacks
- Tests use #[tracing_test::traced_test] for full trace output on failure

Per-bead logging requirements added via --design:
- D.1: posterior/likelihood logging with formatted values
- D.2: per-frame render decision logging with audit mismatch warnings
- E.1: shard-level operation logging with contention tracking
- G.1: change-point detection logging with confidence levels
- G.3: per-tool BOCPD/conformal state logging with fallback warnings

J.1: Add bash E2E script requirement (tests/e2e/test_alien_enhancements.sh)
alongside Rust integration tests, following existing project E2E patterns

Graph: 36 beads, 77 edges, 0 cycles, 12 ready, 0 alerts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
